feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Prebiotic aqueous reactions catalyzed by native nickel without hydrogen
entry.content:
Authors: CG Garcia, M Brabender, WF Martin - The FEBS journal

Abstract: Compared to iron, nickel is comparatively rare as a transition metal in enzymes. However, it is essential in several enzymes of carbon and energy metabolism in acetogens (bacteria) and methanogens (archaea), which use the acetyl-CoA ...

Alert: William Martin (author alert)
